risk_if_not_implemented: Without Public Relations & Reputation Repair, AI and autonomous technology risks may go ungoverned, leading to unintended outcomes or exploitation.

compensating_control_1.name: Contacts With Authorities
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to identify and document appropriate contacts with relevant law enforcement and regulatory bodies.
compensating_control_1.justification: Contacts With Authorities (GOV-06) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Public Relations & Reputation Repair (IRO-16) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Public Relations & Reputation Repair (IRO-16) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
